children.heading: Improvement of process for appropriate referrals for treatment
children.label: a Improvement of process for appropriate referrals for treatment
children.text: With respect to individuals seeking treatment services, a funding agreement for a grant under is that the State involved will improve the process in the State for referring the individuals to treatment facilities that can provide to the individuals the treatment modality that is most appropriate for the individuals.section 300x–21 of this title
recent trends in substance use disorders in the State;
improved methods and evidence-based practices for providing substance use disorder prevention and treatment services;
data collection and reporting requirements; and
any other matters that would serve to further improve the delivery of substance use disorder prevention and treatment services within the State.

children.heading: Coordination of various activities and services
children.label: c Coordination of various activities and services
children.text: A funding agreement for a grant under is that the State involved will coordinate prevention and treatment activities with the provision of other appropriate services (including health, social, correctional and criminal justice, educational, vocational rehabilitation, and employment services).section 300x–21 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Upon the request of a State, the Secretary may provide to a State a waiver of any or all of the requirements established in this section if the Secretary determines that, with respect to services for the prevention and treatment of substance use disorders, the requirement involved is unnecessary for maintaining quality in the provision of such services in the State.

children.heading: Date certain for acting upon request
children.label: 2 Date certain for acting upon request
children.text: The Secretary shall approve or deny a request for a waiver under paragraph (1) not later than 120 days after the date on which the request is made.

children.heading: Applicability of waiver
children.label: 3 Applicability of waiver
children.text: Any waiver provided by the Secretary under paragraph (1) shall be applicable only to the fiscal year involved.
